dict.string: This app does not directly use the camera, but some third-party SDKs may reference camera APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access your photo library, but some third-party SDKs may reference photo library APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly use the microphone, but some third-party SDKs may reference microphone APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access your location, but some third-party SDKs may reference location APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access your contacts, but some third-party SDKs may reference contacts APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access your calendar, but some third-party SDKs may reference calendar APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access your reminders, but some third-party SDKs may reference reminders APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access motion data, but some third-party SDKs may reference motion APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly access health data, but some third-party SDKs may reference health APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly update health data, but some third-party SDKs may reference health APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly use Bluetooth, but some third-party SDKs may reference Bluetooth APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly use Bluetooth, but some third-party SDKs may reference Bluetooth APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly use speech recognition, but some third-party SDKs may reference speech recognition APIs for future functionality.
This app does not directly use Face ID, but some third-party SDKs may reference Face ID APIs for future functionality.
This app does not track users across other apps, but some third-party SDKs may reference tracking APIs for future functionality.
